news.

8/22-28/2000

  • got Ferdinand running. check out the full story in the bikes section (go there quickly using this link.)

5/2/2000

  • went to Vanson spring open house this past weekend with buddy Tobias. Check out the Team Phoenix representatives in the new Vanson 2000 catalog here or click on the catalog to the right.
  • Work continues on the new RS (tenative moniker- "Ferdinand"). Can't get the damned fork retaining nut off the right fork. May need to take a trip to the local tool lending library (i.e. Sears hardware).

[Team Phoenix home page. | Send mail to Team Phoenix.]

Last updated 8/29/00
